darkness and decay.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
Growing more closely than once thought possible, the trees provide a forbidding
environment to try and explore. The pines, oaks, spruces, cedars, and others all
serve to block out the sunlight and impede your progress. The danger from the
wilds is very real here, and warrants caution.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
Within the thickness of the forest, the countless trees press around you,
lending an vaguely evil feeling to this place. The amount of trees and high
roots makes it difficult to walk many places, and you have to pick your way with
care. The sounds of animals can heard from all directions, preventing you from
concentrating on keeping your bearings.
name: The Dark Forest

desc:
Onwards and inwards, you probe the depths of the vast plant life around and
above. The smell of rotting leaves and thick soil fills your nose, and the damp,
still air gives an unsettling feeling to the whole forest. What lives in such a
deep forest, and what will it take to survive? To the north, the forest seems
even darker, somehow possible despite the impenetrable canopy above.
name: The Dark Forest

desc:
Entering the dominant part of the forest, the light quickly is shut out by the
overhead plant life. Oak, pine, spruce, and cedar grow to their maximum heights,
humbling all who stand under such ageless life. The smell of moist and rotting
leaves forces you to take deep breaths, and random noises in the distance
attract your attention away from your chosen path. This is not an area to take
lightly, and woe to any who lack to strength to fight.
name: In a Dark Forest

desc:
Moving further along among the immortal trees, you pause to try and track down
those elusive sounds that prey upon your senses. There appears to be no end to
the natural darkness caused by the immense ceiling of leaves and branches,
forcing you to peer every direction to determine which way could even be
travelled. Sometimes, caution is better than sheer valour in handling threats
that cannot be immediately perceived...
name: In a Dark Forest

desc:
Moving along the ominous paths within the primeval wood, you are beset by
lingering doubts about you abilities. Winning your way further into the forest
will not be easy. A small patch of ground not covered by leaves clearly displays
the paw of some huge animal. You strain your eyes looking for possible threats
as you consider your options.
name: The Dark Forest

desc:
Moving to this cul-de-sac of the forest, the darkness continues to press upon
your head. The canopy of leaves and branches is not there to protect, but to
trap you within the home of the evil inhabitants. Blinking your eyes, you notice
a spring of cool water, hopefully uncontaminated despite the reek that hangs in
the clammy air.
name: Midnight Forest

desc:
Efforts to probe into the deepest parts of the primeval forest are mocked by an
impassable wall of roots and trees to the south. To the north, however, you
believe you could squeeze through, and perhaps find a way in more to the north.
Shaking some clinging leaves from your boots, you trudge onward.
name: Deep in a Large Forest

desc:
Standing in what you approximate as near the western border of the forest, you
unfortunately cannot see any way to work yourself through the thick growth. Most
of the time, you can pick several ways to go, and you can only pray that
eventually you can find the way out. Kicking aside a rotting branch that flies
apart from your boot, you press onwards.
name: Deep in a Large Forest

desc:
The thick pine trees form an unbroken canopy above you. Their smooth unbroken
trunks rise to a great height and then spread out into thick crowns. The ground
is covered with decaying pine needles and dark stones that have a slimy
appearance. The usual fresh smell of pine needles seems to be lost in pervading
climate of darkness and decay. Eastward the forest is very thick.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
The forest is quite thin here. The trees admit a lot of sunlight to the forest
floor where small plants grow thickly. To the east and north the forest thickens
rapidly and to the west you can see a dam and a lake.
name: In the Light Forest

desc:
The forest is quite thin here. The trees admit a lot of sunlight to the forest
floor where small plants grow thickly. To the east and north the forest thickens
rapidly and to the west you can see a crude dam of tree trunks, behind which a
stagnant pool of water has collected.
name: In the Light Forest

desc:
You are in a dark, dense forest. All sounds of animals and the like have
dissappeared. The light is dim here. To the east you see a steep slope which
looks extremely treacherous. To the west the forest gets even darker and to the
north a sheer rock face towers above you.
name: In a Thick Forest

desc:
The very ground of these lands seems old, worn, and faded, as if devoid of any
sign of life. Long crevices like millennial wrinkles cross its surface, which
looks chipped, crumbled up in a myriad of fragments of rock. This is certainly a
wasted region, castigated by the wear of time, the harsh climate, and the fierce
wars of the past.
name: Rocky Plains

desc:
A few dun bushes with a scraggy look strew the discoloured surface of the stony
ground. This has an utterly worn appearance, as though a horde of huge beasts
had trampled over it, or it had been whittled away for countless years. Lots of
pebbles lie scattered all about, but it is the large amount of dust and gravel
that mainly command one's attention. A deep fissure cuts through the landscape
to the north.
name: Dusty Lowlands

desc:
With no nearby shelter to oppose the winds that sweep the wide valley of the
Bruinen, nor the abundant rains of this harsh climate, this vast open area of
plains stands buffeted by the elements. But the gentle stream of the river
bathes the riverside, and thus the soil is humid and rich. Grass grows tall and
healthy, and a variety of wildflowers abound.
name: Blustery Plains by the River

desc:
An ample plain extends by the riverside. Hardly any small rise stands out of the
utterly level ground, as if the spates of the near river, or the copious rains
had swept along any feature of the landscape. Contrarily, tiny, shallow pools
abound, filling every small depression of the earth. A mixed vegetation of thick
grass and high reeds sprouts all over the place, but especially by the river
bank.
name: Flat Riverside

desc:
You find yourself at the mouth of a wide dale going steeply downward towards the
river on the east. Shielded by the solid valley walls of stone, and bathed in
the pure waters of the Bruinen, vegetation grows lush, carpeting the ground in a
deep green shade. Thus, the vale looks like a hidden garden amidst the stony
moors lying all round, or maybe like a tiny green point among a greyish stain,
in the eyes of the great eagles that ride the winds.
name: Entering a Green Valley

desc:
Hillock after hillock and moor after moor, the mostly barren landscape rolls
before your eyes. Here the ground undulates in a myriad of small, faded-grey,
dull-looking hills. At times, one can hear the howling of the cold, northerly
wind echoing through the dale, lashing the hillock summits and sweeping the
dusty fields. On the north, the hills rise more tightly forming shadowy vales,
their broken peaks outlined against the horizon.
name: Windswept Foothills

desc:
The low hills in this area block out the view of the broad landscape. All you
can see are the greyish plants that somehow cover the hills here. Some lingering
evil is near here, but you cannot seem to discover a particular source.
name: Brooding Hills

desc:
Standing on one of the tall hills in the area, you force yourself to ignore the
strange and disturbing vegetation and look around. To the east, more hills
follow, with the River Bruinen barely visible far away. The huge forest to the
north and west seems to be the best choice for your will to explore.
name: Brooding Hills

desc:
Bordering the tall, brooding hills to the south, this section of the forest
grows much shorter than most of the rest. The canopy is very thick, but seems
much less alive. The leaves on the ground are all brittle and shiny, and you
cannot find one leaf that is green. The trunks are somewhat twisted, as if some
force has warped the will of this forest. A pang of fear stabs your heart as you
consider this.
name: In a Dusky Forest

desc:
This part of the forest, unlike most of the rest, is not nearly as healthy. The
trees grow only to about half the height of the others, but still manage to
block out all the sunlight. Picking up a leaf from the ground, it has a strange,
almost metallic sheen to it, and crumbles quickly under your rough handling.
Something is not right here, and your interests might be best served by not
finding out why.
name: In a Dusky Forest

desc:
Walking along the ridge of hills, you ponder about the depressing atmosphere
that hangs around here. The large forest to the east and north rises almost to
the height of these large hills. You consider the pros and cons of adventuring
there while you rest a second.
name: Brooding Hills

desc:
Looking over the rest of the landscape, these brooding hills provide a constant
if troubling watch over the huge forest to the west and north. The health of the
forest seems to mock the hills, as if the forest was responsible for the sad
state of these hills. Greyish grass covers the sides, while turning your gaze to
the south gives a view of rocky hillocks rising to bald, flat tops.
name: Brooding Hills

desc:
A group of small, rounded hills rise close to each other in this area. Their
gentle hillsides show green and brown hues, dotted in shrubbery and weeds.
However, their flattened tops look bare, devoid of any sort of vegetation,
offering only the dull, pale grey of the worn rock to the light. By their
appearance, one can guess that they must certainly be old, perhaps as much as
the imposing Hithaeglir, or even more.
name: Bald Hillocks

desc:
The ground drops down to the south, following the line of a wide crevice running
from west to east, like a deep wound in the split terrain. As a result, a high
wall of bare rock drops vertically down to the plains below. The gravelly stone
has a yellowish look, as if sick from the sunlight. There are hardly any
footholds in the rockface, and the few that exist seem unsafe and dangerous,
hence the descent becomes impossible here.
name: Atop a Plummeting Rock Face

desc:
Wide and deep runs this crack, cutting through the battered ground, like a
marked, millennial scar. It appears to be as old as the very Misty Mountains,
raised by the Great Enemy in times as sinister as forgotten. Large heaps of
stones crowd at the bottom, shrouded in thick shadows. To the south, it may be
feasible to attempt the climb, but the northern face looks unassailable indeed.
name: A Cranny in the Plains

desc:
The thick pine trees form an unbroken canopy above you. Their smooth unbroken
trunks rise to a great height and then spread out into thick crowns. The ground
is covered with decaying pine needles and dark stones that have a slimy
appearance. The usual fresh smell of pine needles seems to be lost in pervading
climate of darkness and decay. Eastward the forest is very thick.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
The thick pine trees form an unbroken canopy above you. Their smooth unbroken
trunks rise to a great height and then spread out into thick crowns. The ground
is covered with decaying pine needles and dark stones that have a slimy
appearance. The usual fresh smell of pine needles seems to be lost in pervading
climate of darkness and decay. Eastward the forest is very thick. It is very
dark, the cliff westward shadows the forest deeply but to the north you see the
forest grow lighter.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
Long ago some industrious labourer cleared away a large swath of forest. The
clearing is already well on the way to being reclaimed by its brooding
neighbour. Scattered clumps of bushes and young trees are the early colonists
Northward you can see a deserted habitation. To the west you can see the
northeastern corner of the impressively sheer rock mass.
name: Clearing

desc:
The thick pine trees form an unbroken canopy above you. Their smooth unbroken
trunks rise to a great height and then spread out into thick crowns. The ground
is covered with decaying pine needles and dark stones that have a slimy
appearance. The usual fresh smell of pine needles seems to be lost in pervading
climate of darkness and decay. Southward the forest is very thick.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
The thick pine trees form an unbroken canopy above you. Their smooth unbroken
trunks rise to a great height and then spread out into thick crowns. The ground
is covered with decaying pine needles and dark stones that have a slimy
appearance. The usual fresh smell of pine needles seems to be lost in pervading
climate of darkness and decay. Eastward the forest is very thick. But westward
and northward you can see that the forest gets thinner.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
The various trees growing here--pine, oak, spruce, cedar, reach incredible
heights above. The multitude of their branches forms an impenetrable canopy that
blocks out every bit of possible light, plunging the forest into eternal night.
Even with light, the trunks seem to be of blackened wood, yet no fire has
touched these immortal trees. The leaves on the ground are of large size,
blanketing everything and muffling sounds. The cloying, sweet smell of leaves
and pollen makes you slightly dizzy. Danger lurks in this forest, demanding your
constant attention.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
This part of the forest is clearly back from the boarders. The trees dominate
your sight, rising so high above. No light comes through, even in the brightest
sunlight. Your pulse quickens with the anticipation of threats from all around,
as nameless creatures pad quietly among the trunks. The smell of leaves and
trees, usually reassuring, only threatens to distract you.
name: Deep in a Large Forest

desc:
You are standing at the northern edge of the forest, yet the thickness of the
trees growing so closely together has not changed at all. Their verdant canopy
still blocks out all of the sunlight. The only light you see are the occasional
flickers to the north, but there is way you can work through the plant life
growing that way. Instead, you must find another way, and brave whatever hazards
lurk in this immense forest. Adjusting your equipment, you ponder where to go.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
Walking along the northern rim of the forest, you are amazed at how consistent
the thickness of the forest is. Only brief and fleeting glimpses of light to the
north tell you are standing near the edge. Frustration sets in because of the
realization that despite being close to leaving here, no egress exists. The
thick, cloying smell of old leaves and rich loam is lighter here, but is still
quite strong. The options for exit are still limited, but a distant howl goads
you on.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
Tracing the edge of the mighty forest, you stop to rest a second in this eerie
place. Only the occasional rustle can be heard, with not even the singing of
birds to reassure you. Finding a way might be the highest priority, as the sheer
size of the wood unnerves even the coolest of adventurers. No animal tracks can
be seen in the thick covering of leaves, and you hope that means that nothing
could track you as well.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
Moving a bit deeper into the forest, the trees grow a bit closer together. The
rich and bittersweet smell of fallen leaves is strong, masking anything else
that might leave an odour. The choice between possible escape and further
adventure wars in your mind, and you take a gut check to see where you stand.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
The search for a way out is becoming maddening. The forest continues on for
miles, yet no way exists to leave. In your weary mind, you sense the forest
laughing at you, mocking your feeble efforts to escape. A rustling of leaves
quickly brings you back to your senses, and you look around for a path to
follow.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
Damn! What looked to be a way out onto some sort of trail is blocked by an
immense fallen tree. Even despite the loss of so great a trunk, no sunlight
reaches down into these depths. Leaning up against the trunk a second, you wipe
your sweating brow and take a second to relax. Better to be rested in combat
than stumbling in exhaustion.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
Though away from the centre of the forest, this section is still as thick and
daunting as the others. Maybe you will get lucky and find a way out to some
brightly lit place, but hope can be deadly when the immediate threat is so
close. Tripping on a root, you curse and vow to burn more wood next winter.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
The trees here, of pine, oak, spruce, and cedar, grow high above your head.
Finally, the fallen leaves display the different colours they should. Though
cheered by this sight, the threat obviously remains, and warrants your undivided
attention. Why would anything voluntarily live so far away from the sun, and yet
live in the living wild?
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
Picking your way carefully among the thick trunks, you again ponder the
significance of these strange trees. The leaves, though not as brittle, are
still of that odd black colour, and you long for the sight of green, verdant
trees and dappled sunlight. Adjusting your equipment, you sigh and continue to
look for a path.
name: In a Dusky Forest

desc:
Moving further into the inky depths, the trees grow a bit taller, but still have
unnatural twists and turns to what should be tall and proud trunks. The pine and
oak trees are alive, but not what is normally considered healthy. Your boots
crunch noisily on the black, brittle leaves that cover the floor of the forest
in massive amounts. You wish for sunlight to illuminate this place and perhaps
drive the evil spirit that pervades here away.
name: In a Dusky Forest

desc:
The call of the adventurer, that which has claimed so many people, sings loudly
in your heart. Taking on the obvious dangers here, you explore further into the
depths of the forest. The canopy of thick branches and leaves gives the
impression of being in a living cavern, with growing stalagmites holding up the
ceiling. Combat skills honed to perfection, you brandish your weapon and
continue inwards.
name: Deep in a Large Forest

desc:
Summoning all of your courage, you enter the centre of the forest. The darkness
here is complete, smothering both light and mind in its evil embrace. Your
feeble torches only bring out shadows and indistinct forms. Even more chilling,
is that these forms are moving, seeking you out to destroy you. Readying your
weapons, you prepare yourself for battle.
name: Midnight Forest

desc:
Peering towards the east, all you see are countless trees growing high above
you. No access to the interior is visible, despite the growing curiosity about
what lies in there. In this deep wilderness, expect no mercy from the
inhabitants, and you check you weapon's readiness to be sure of yourself.
name: Deep in a Large Forest

desc:
Moving along as best you can among the roots, you struggle from tree to tree. No
real path seems to exist here, at least none you can tell. The thick ground
covering only serves to confuse your dulled senses, and the unknown, unseen
threat serves to fray your once steel nerves. One might consider leaving here
while they can.
name: Deep in a Large Forest

desc:
Standing here, you see more of the same. Impressive trunks of ancient wood
arching high above you, with their canopy of branches and leaves forming a
ceiling as dark as stone. Strange sounds echo through the tree tops, even as the
padding of many paws is muffled by the thick, spongy layer of dirt and wet
leaves. By now, you can't tell which way might get you out of this incredible
forest.
name: Deep in a Large Forest

desc:
Finally! A small path is visible to the east, leading to an even deeper section
of this immense wood. The inky blackness lends no clues to what lies there, but
you are tempted to brave the unknown anyway. For those of faint heart, access is
open to the west, away from the beating heart of the canopied forest.
name: Deep in a Large Forest

desc:
Plunging into the depths, you step into part of the forest which throbs with a
malevolent force. This is an evil forest, and you sense a desire to kill you and
all your kind, and let the land be covered in living darkness. A rugged path is
to the east, but you doubt you could manage to come back that way. The trees
don't seem quite as vibrant, consumed by the driving power which preys on your
sanity.
name: A Dismal Forest

desc:
Nearing the heart of the mighty wood, you sense the evil pulsing with around
you. The canopy of leaves and branches holds in the darkness and spite,
concentrating it more towards the centre. Indistinct sounds are heard from every
and yet no direction. The atmosphere smothers your courage, and fear for your
life.
name: A Dismal Forest

desc:
Passage is difficult here, due to the thick, warped roots and massive trunks of
hardwood trees. Pine and oak trees dominate the view, with the occasional spruce
or even cedar tree breaking the pattern. The moist leaves on the ground mask
your steps, as well as that of any possible predators. Perhaps a little
exploration will yield the secrets of this dark wood, and with luck reap the
rewards.
name: Deep in a Large Forest

desc:
Being here is an obvious decision to assuage your curiosity and probe further
into the depths of this primeval landscape. Moving silently as possible, you
scan the darkness around you for the telltale gleam of a predator's eye. The
smell of leaves fills your head, causing your vision to blur slightly. To your
hazy thoughts, combat would be a good way to clear your mind.
name: Deep in the Large Forest

desc:
This far into the forest, the trees become more than just towers of living wood.
A faint feeling of awareness emanates around you, perhaps due to your jangled
nerves. The network of trees and roots makes passage difficult, and you are
afraid of losing your way if not careful. Several paths seem to lead away, but
you cannot tell which is the best one to take.
name: Deep in the Large Forest

desc:
Moving carefully among the thick trunks of countless trees, you have reached a
bit of a cul-de-sac. The forest is so thick you cannot seem to manage to go
anywhere but the way you came. Maybe there is an advantage to that, since any
threat would have to come from the south. Finding the way out might be your next
goal.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
You stand in an old long abandoned courtyard that served the inn whose ruins you
can see to the west. To the south and east the forest grows thickly. To the
north you see what appears to be an old road.
name: Old Courtyard

desc:
The thick pine trees form an unbroken canopy above you. Their smooth unbroken
trunks rise to a great height and then spread out into thick crowns. The ground
is covered with decaying pine needles and dark stones that have a slimy
appearance. The usual fresh smell of pine needles seems to be lost in pervading
climate of darkness and decay. You hear the murmur of water to the west and you
sense a towering presence to the north.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
The thick pine trees form an unbroken canopy above you. Their smooth unbroken
trunks rise to a great height and then spread out into thick crowns. The ground
is covered with decaying pine needles and dark stones that have a slimy
appearance. The usual fresh smell of pine needles seems to be lost in pervading
climate of darkness and decay. You hear the murmur of water to the west and you
sense a towering presence to the north.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
The large rock face to the south has deprived the trees here of sunlight. In the
resulting shadow they have decayed and rotted, some with the sweet sickly odour
of death, others with the gnarled withered contortion of lightless old age. From
somewhere westward, the muted gurgle of water can be heard.
name: In a Dead Forest

desc:
Here a slow stagnant stream laden with the detritus of the dead forest vanishes
abruptly beneath the rock face. You can hear the echoing water in the spaces of
the rock as it flows southward on its hidden journey. There is a glimpse of sky
here which serves to depress rather than to cheer.
name: The Vanishing Stream

desc:
The large rock face to the south has deprived the trees here of sunlight. In the
resulting shadow they have decayed and rotted, some with the sweet sickly odour
of death, others with the gnarled withered contortion of lightless old age. You
sense evil. You shiver. East you hear the muted gurgle of water. North a large
spire of rock pushes its way above the forest.
name: In a Dead Forest

desc:
You find yourself at the northeastern edge of a massive rocky outcropping, which
rears high and sombre above you. Leaving the area shadowed from the best of the
sunlight, but exposed to the bitter northern winds of winter, the hill has
rendered this part of the woodland stunted and sickly.
name: At the Slopes of a Rocky Outcropping

desc:
The large rock face to the south has deprived the trees here of sunlight. In the
resulting shadow they have decayed and rotted, some with the sweet sickly odour
of death, others with the gnarled withered contortion of lightless old age.
Somehow this place exudes an aura of evil.
name: In a Dead Forest

desc:
You stand in a field behind an old deserted ruin. The forest grows densely to
the east and west. South you see a clearing. The field is littered with decayed
remnants of carriages and wine casks. Southwest of here you see the large mass
of rock that dominates the landscape.
name: Behind an Abandoned Building

desc:
You are inside an old abandoned inn. The walls have all decayed away and the
chief remaining structure is the central chimney. You see the broken old
fireplace which seems to contain some bones. All else is ruin and decay.
name: Abandoned Inn

desc:
Here on the elevated ground the vegetation grows sparsely in what light the huge
rock mass to the south allows it to have. The slopes are riddled with huge
depressions some filled with rocks and massive boulders. There is life here and
on the breeze a faint odour of decay.
name: On the Hills

desc:
Here on the elevated ground the vegetation grows sparsely in what light the huge
rock mass to the south allows it to have. The slopes are riddled with huge
depressions some filled with rocks and boulders. The air reeks of some
nauseating stench and on the ground you see large bestial tracks.
name: On the Hills

desc:
Here the stream is born. Between the hills on the east and the lonely sentinel
of the rock spire on the right the water comes bubbling fresh and clean from the
earth. Northward you see an old trail and to the south the shadows deepen.
name: Source of the Stream

desc:
Though the cave is fairly small, its air feels fairly fresh and cool, with a
slightly wet and metallic tang, presumably due to the mineral-rich waters of the
underground stream, which makes its sluggish way across one end. It is not clear
where the water originates, because it flows so slowly that it is almost
stagnant.
name: In a Damp Cavern

desc:
A fairly large pond of water pools here, behind a roughly formed dam of heavy
tree trunks. With its sluggish flow stopped entirely, the water has become quite
stagnant here, and a thick scum of algae floats upon its dark surface.
name: A Stagnant Pool of Water

desc:
Here on the northern shore of the pond, a small shelf of dry land arcs around
the waters, clinging to a sheer rockface, which rears above you to the north.
The ground slopes sharply down into the pool, but here and there you can see
large depressions.
name: Along a Sheer Rock Face

desc:
This corner of the canyon bends to the north and east, forming a right angle
with the incredibly high walls. The air is still and tense, making you jump at
the slightest sound. This leads to the Trollshaws, tempting your will to fight
with your instinct to survive.
name: Canyon Floor

desc:
From this vantage point, all you can see are sheets of rock rising a hundred
feet above you. A sense of vertigo briefly distracts you due to the height.
Jarring your observations is the constant danger that lurks here, since you are
not in a land where the weak survive.
name: Canyon Floor

desc:
Sloping downwards slightly, this valley of stone leads you onwards to the
eventual bottom of the canyon. To get there, you would have to climb down a
steep slope, but you think the trip would be safe enough. The faint smell of
excrement hangs in the air, forcing you to cover your nose as you check the
readiness of your weapons.
name: A Rocky Valley

desc:
This corner of the canyon bends from the east to the north. The sheer southern
canyon wall gives you an idea just how far down you are, and you briefly
contemplate what would happen if you had fallen off from the top. With a start,
the realization sinks in that this is part of the dreaded Trollshaws, and as
such a very real danger exists here. A faint smell of offal hangs in the air; a
reminder to keep alert.
name: A Rocky Valley

desc:
This point is definitely at the bottom of the surrounding landscape. Up to the
east is a large bowl of rock, and to the south is the massive stone wall of the
canyon. To the north, the other side is too tall to allow climbing, allowing
progress either onward down the valley or back to the crater.
name: A Rocky Valley

desc:
Despite the nearness to the rocky edge of the deep canyon, the forest is still
quite thick. Tall and healthy oaks, pines, aspens, and other trees grow
abundantly, blocking even most of the site of the terrain to the north. If you
wish to explore down there, a rain trail to the east looks usable, but it is
quite steep.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
North of the trail which winds its way by the canyon and forest, this edge is
still very thick. The deep canyon forbids travel to the north, confounding your
curiosity about what might lie down there. The forest stretches a bit further to
the east, barely thin enough to allow travel.
name: In a Dense Forest

desc:
Like all along the eastern shore of the Bruinen, the terrain ascends steeply as
it goes away from the waters, among large, grey boulders darkened by the
moisture. All sorts of weeds and bushes grow in the hollows of the rocks, and so
do tangled brambles with prickles all over. The western face offers only a sheer
drop down to the waters, as though these had thoroughly scratched the riverbed
over the years. But on the north, it seems feasible to approach the stream,
although the descent doesn't look easy at all.
name: Sloping River Bank

desc:
This is basically a dark crawlspace under the ruined and rotted floorboards of
the inn. Apart from unrecognisable scraps of wood, which may have once been
bottles, boxes, or the timbers of the inn itself, there is nothing but dirt and
roots.
name: Under the Floorboards

desc:
This smelly lair has been coarsely dug in the earthy ground. Long, twisted roots
hang from the wet ceiling. The remnants of the rotten undergrowth lie
everywhere. The stench of dead vegetation is piercingly strong, only to be
accentuated by the suffocating smell of several putrid corpses and other filth
of undetermined origin. Here and there a dim glint of metal attracts the eye to
some rusty tools half-buried among the decayed rubbish.
name: A Stinking Burrow

desc:
You find yourself at the top of a huge tree standing several feet out of the
impenetrable, tangled foliage. Here at the treetop, however, the leaves bear a
much more wholesome appearance, as if the fresh air and the warm sunlight had
breathed renewed energy into them, revitalizing them. The forest ceiling spreads
all about below, like a sinister, waving sea. And the thick trunk rises up above
the dark-green waters, like a lofty, natural lighthouse.
name: Atop a Lofty Tree

desc:
Rocks of every shape and size can be seen scattered along the path to the top of
the hill. No grass grows here, just stones and hard brown dirt cover the ground.
A small circle of stones sits atop the hill surrounded by boulders to sit on.
Remains of camps are scattered among the rocks.
name: Rocky Mound

desc:
The waters of this deep underground stream flow so slowly as to be almost a
stagnant pool. Rich in minerals, the chilly liquid has a sharp metallic tang.
name: A Dark and Chilly Waterway

desc:
A deep cleft has been cut through the cold, hard rock of the hills, creating a
cramped waterway. But whilst the waters must once have flowed freely through
here, now they stand, almost stagnant. To the north the gully opens out into a
broad tunnel mouth, whilst to the south bits and pieces of debris are piled
against the wall of the chamber, almost obscuring the wide cracks and fissures
which can be seen in the rock.
name: In the Depths of the Underground Waterway

desc:
The murky waters of the pool surround you, chilling you to the very core.
Filling a narrow gulf, this dirty pond would not be, but for a crude dam to the
south, whilst to the north its waters are very slowly replenished by a sluggish
inflow, via a number of wide crasks and fissures in the rocky wall.
name: Deep in the Murky Waters

desc:
This is a dry cave apparently beneath the hill. The stench of rotting flesh is
is all around. Some here might even feel the urge to vomit. Putting the stench
aside one can very quickly notice the cramped quarters.
name: Cave

desc:
The forest floor begins to rise slightly to the south. The smell of pine sap
permeates the forest. The trunks of the pines deposit sticky sweet smelling sap
on anyone or anything which brushes against them. High overhead the branches of
pine needles sway in the wind.
name: Rising Pines

desc:
The sides of the hills here are the only possible routes one can travel. Rocks
and trees soon make climbing to the top impossible. A rocky outcropping blocks
the passage to the south and west here, blocking the stream that flows below.
name: On the Hills

desc:
Small rocks dominate the ground of the hill here and overgrown weeds climb
around small boulders alongside the stream to the south. The bank of the water
here is too steep to climb in either direction. The hills continue to the east
and west, and quickly the forest at the base of the hills becomes too dense to
see through.
name: Hillock

desc:
At the very centre of the dark and dreaded forest, the evil force pulses through
the trees themselves. Twisted, yet titanic, they stretch far above you, holding
you with their choking embrace. Everything here is black, forcing you to jump at
shadows to explore this small clearing. The hideous stench of filthy and
disgusting beings mingles with the decaying leaves, forcing you to gag even as
you try to rekindle the spark of courage.
name: Midnight Forest

desc:
The road is rough and ragged, the wheel marks of many wagons still remaining in
the brown, well-trodden land. A lush meadow rises above to the north, and the
road bends slightly to the south and west. A tree-infested hill rises sharply to
the east.
name: Old East Road

desc:
The hills here seem to grow out of one another making the climb all the more
treacherous. The ground is soft and numerous times safe footing has to be sought
out after slipping in the mud. A tall stand of trees looms over the hill to the
west and a group of lower hills lie to the land in the east.
name: Sloping Ground

desc:
En route to the ground far below, your mind leaves your body, taking the time to
admire the landscape in the few seconds before impact. Maybe the next
opportunity, you will choose to respect the physical laws which govern Arda.
name: Canyon

desc:
En route to the ground far below, your mind leaves your body, taking the time to
admire the landscape in the few seconds before impact. Maybe the next
opportunity, you will choose to respect the physical laws which govern Arda.
name: Canyon

desc:
A large jumble of old tree trunks has dammed the small stream, reducing its flow
to a mere trickle here. The already sluggish waters, now slowed and stopped by
the barrier have become stagnant, and a green scum floats upon the surface. To
the west, this foetid pool is banked by a steep slope, above which the dark
forest can be spied.
name: On the Dam
